name: OMENS by SevArlen
description: OMENS by SevArlen — 256 fully on-chain generative sigils on Bitcoin. Each token reads one byte of its seed as an oracle, naming one of 32 hand-authored glyphs across 8 families (Element, Time, Labor, Secret, Crowd, Absence, Limit, Cult). Fully recursive: a single shared engine inscription renders every piece, trustlessly bound to the cover as parent.
